text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is ending. Agnes<n>Digital and King
Halo bring it to a<n>close by running together.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, wheeze... Thank you for therun, King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Digital. You seemed sohesitant while you were running.What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's just that... you were far more<n>remarkable than
I imagined, and I<n>couldn't run with a clear head...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've only ever watched you before...<n>So trying to
chase after you now just<n>seemed to be... too
selfish.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm just a nobody who only recently<n>made up her
mind to run seriously...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, you really have no self-esteem,do you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But... is that honestly all?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I understand you have an inferiority<n>complex, but
is that really all that's<n>holding you back?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There must be another reason why<n>running
doesn't get you excited.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, well...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Is this really Digital's true<n>ability?
choice_data_list: I actually think she's unbeatable on dirt...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?! M-m-my defenses...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's performance was<n>clearly strange,
even to me. The<n>reason is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uh... Well, recently, King...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You... haven't been yourself...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Compared to when you won the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen this spring...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
From your form's flow... to your<n>usually lively
underarms...<n>Something's missing from that
sizzling sensation you spark.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can tell... because I'm always<n>watching. I watch
you so intently, I<n>almost fall out of the stands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, I know! I know how much you've<n>been
suffering. I know now because...<n>I've started
racing too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's why...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why you didn't give it your<n>all?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. There's no way I would ever<n>kick an
Umamusume while she's<n>down—especially one I
love as much<n>as you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I see... Hehe... You know, Digital...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You're a real dingus.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I said you're a dingus. A big one.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You might know a lot about me, but<n>you definitely
don't understand.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Harsh words. Yet beneath the barbs,<n>her voice is
kind.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Digital, would you say you're still<n>drawn to me
even when I'm like<n>this?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! Of course!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In that case...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I want you to learn more. Strive to<n>understand me
by the time of the Mile<n>Championship.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As we train together, try to<n>understand what kind
of Umamusume<n>I really am.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
T-together? Me and you? Even after<n>summer
camp is over?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Are you sure it's okay?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-then yes, please! I'm not worthy,<n>but yes! A
million times yes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-I-I'd be honored! It's too much of<n>an honor! My
tail won't stop<n>wagging! Me! Training with such a
goddess!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At the end of the summer, a small<n>bond has been
born between Agnes<n>Digital and a racer she looks
up to.
